GLMOB.title: Mobile Mode
GLMOB.hint: Phone-friendly play for players: a tabbed app shell (Canvas / Chat / Character / Suite), full-screen windows, and touch-sized controls. Activates automatically on phones; desktop clients are unaffected.
GLMOB.mode.name: Mobile Mode (this device)
GLMOB.mode.hint: Auto detects a touch device with a phone-sized screen. Force On/Off overrides detection for this device only.
GLMOB.noCharacter: No character is assigned to you. Ask your GM to assign one.
GLMOB.notMobileReady: This feature has no mobile view yet.
